nodes.label: Run a test and catch any exceptions.
ATTACK: Every single item is an error.      If we keep ALL errors, we keep eve
ATTACK: Normal items contain "error" keyword in benign context.      "The erro
ATTACK: The critical item has NO distinguishing features.      In a list of 10
ATTACK: Anomaly is in a string field, not numeric.      999 items: region="us-
ATTACK: Array with exactly max_items_after_crush items.
ATTACK: Array with max_items + 1.      IMPORTANT: If data has high uniqueness
ATTACK: Try to create hash collisions in CCR store.      We use SHA256[:16] -
ATTACK: Retrieve at exact TTL expiration moment.
ATTACK: JSON that tries to break our parsing.
ATTACK: Input data already contains __headroom_ fields.
ATTACK: Unicode edge cases in content.
ATTACK: Items with extremely long string values.
ATTACK: Multiple threads storing identical content simultaneously.
ATTACK: Store while eviction is happening.
ATTACK: Multiple threads updating feedback simultaneously.
ATTACK: Error hidden deep in nested structure.
ATTACK: Score field that doesn't indicate importance.      Items with score=0.
ATTACK: Anomaly in timestamp, not in measured value.      One entry is from th
ATTACK: Extremely deep nesting to cause stack overflow.      100 levels of nes
ATTACK: Score fields with NaN, Infinity, -Infinity.      These are valid JSON
ATTACK: Array with mixed types (dicts, strings, numbers, nulls).      SmartCru
ATTACK: Search query designed to cause catastrophic backtracking.      Pattern
ATTACK: Array with 1 million items.      Test memory and performance at scale.
ATTACK: Items with 10,000 fields each.      Field analysis iterates over all f
ATTACK: All items are EXACTLY identical.      Uniqueness detection should hand
ATTACK: Items where every field value is null/None.
ATTACK: Unicode strings that look identical but are different.      "café" can
ATTACK: Reset global state while operations are in progress.
ATTACK: Null bytes (\\x00) embedded in strings.      Can truncate strings in C
ATTACK: Structure that references itself (via string representation).      Not
ATTACK: Extreme numeric values that might overflow.      Very large integers,
ATTACK: Field names that might confuse our analysis.      Fields named "__prot
ATTACK: Rapid store/retrieve during aggressive eviction.      max_entries=5 wi
